parity_goal: Preserve the source-led, one-decision-at-a-time workflow without private workspace assumptions.

cases.prompt: $decision-walkthrough Walk me through this feedback and help me decide what to do.
expected: accounts for every source item while grouping only shared decisions
presents one source-backed recommendation and decision question at a time
maintains one practical decision log and ends with an implementation checklist

cases.prompt: $decision-walkthrough Help me choose between the conflicting recommendations in these notes.
expected: uses Needs evidence when a recommendation would require invented assumptions
asks only for the fastest missing fact before requesting the final decision
